registers_list.name: counter_en
registers_list.description:
This register enables/disables the counter.
Register fields:
1.Counter enable bit [0]:
-0: Disable the counter
-1: Enable the counter

registers_list.name: counter_main_load
registers_list.description: This register holds the main value that will be loaded to the counter on the next load operation.

registers_list.name: counter_secondary_load
registers_list.description: This register holds the secondary value that will be loaded to the counter on the next load operation. This register affects the counter in the double wrap mode.

registers_list.name: counter_number_of_cycles
registers_list.description: This register holds the (number of cycles - 1) that the counter needs to change its value. The register is not allowed to be changed while the counter is enabled.

registers_list.name: counter_mode_control
registers_list.description:
This register controls the counter mode and direction.
Register fields:
1.Counter mode bits [1:0]:
-00: Run the counter in the Free-running mode
-01: Run the counter in the Single-wrap-point mode
-10: Run the counter in the Double-wrap-point mode
-11: Run the counter in the Special-single-wrap-point mode
2.Counter direction bit [2]:
-0: Program the counter to count down
1: Program the counter to count up

registers_list.name: counter_current_count
registers_list.description: This register holds the current count value of the counter.

registers_list.name: counter_wrap_count
registers_list.description: This register holds the number of wraps that the counter has passed through. It resets in the following cases: On mode change, and after reading the register.

registers_list.name: counter_overflow
registers_list.description: This interrupt will be activated (value 1) when an overflow is occurred in the counter block when the count value increments above the max value (2^DATA_WIDTH-1).

registers_list.name: counter_underflow
registers_list.description: This interrupt will be activated (value 1) when an underflow is occurred in the counter block when the count value decrements below the min value (0)

registers_list.name: counter_wrap
registers_list.description: This interrupt will be activated when the counter value reaches a wrap point specified in the Main load or Secondary load registers depending on the counter mode and type- then wraps to another point.

registers_list.name: counter_region_changed
registers_list.description: This interrupt is activated when the region that the counter is counted at is changed. Region change will occur when the counting direction is changed.

registers_list.name: pwm_en
registers_list.description:
It is responsible for, enabling or disabling the modulation ports, defining the polarity of the signal, defining the type of the signal PWM/SPWM, and enabling or disabling phase shift operation
Register fields:
1. Port i Enable bit [4i]:
-0: Disable modulation port i
-1: Enables modulation port i
2.Port i Polarity bit [4i+1]:
-0: In port i, the HIGH signal will be represented by logic 0 and the LOW signal will be represented by logic 1.
-1: In port i, the HIGH signal will be represented by logic 1 and the LOW signal will be represented by logic 0.
3.Port i Type bit [4i+2]:
-0: Set port i signal type to PWM
-1: Set port i signal type to SPWM
4.Port i Phase Shift bit [4i+3]:
-0: Disables the phase shift operation in port i
-1: Enables the phase shift operation in port i

registers_list.name: pwm_prescalar
registers_list.description:
First parameter that defines PWM frequency.
Register fields:
pwm_prescaler bits [4i:4i+3]:
Represents the pwm_prescaler value for port i frequency parameters. (It is preferable to be in the 0 – 10 range)

registers_list.name: pwm_duty_cycle
registers_list.description: The percentage that the PWM signal will stay high within one period for port [x].

registers_list.name: pwm_freq_rsl
registers_list.description: Second parameter that defines the PWM frequency for port [x].

registers_list.name: spwm_n_step
registers_list.description: First numerator  parameter that defines SPWM frequency for port [x].

registers_list.name: spwm_d_step
registers_list.description: Second denominator parameter that defines SPWM frequency for port [x].

registers_list.name: trng_n_step
registers_list.description: First numerator  parameter that defines Triangular frequency for port [x].

registers_list.name: trng_d_step
registers_list.description: Second denominator parameter that defines Triangular frequency for port [x].

registers_list.name: spwm_fixed_range_angle
registers_list.description: The starting angle for Fixed Range SPWM feature. It also represents the first byte of phase shift angle of SPWM for port [x].

registers_list.name: spwm_fixed_range
registers_list.description: The length for the fixed value of Fixed Range SPWM feature for port [x].

registers_list.name: spwm_phase_shift
registers_list.description: Second byte for phase shift angle of SPWM for port [x]. It has 3-bit resolution with 0.125.

registers_list.name: spwm_fixed_range_qrtr_en
registers_list.description:
It is responsible for enabling (value 1) each quarter of the four quarters within one SPWM period for Fixed Range SPWM feature for port0 and port1. The bits [4i:4i+3] are related to the quarters of port i, the detailed view of the quarters is as follows:
Bit [4i]: Port i 1st quarter
Bit [4i+1]: Port i 2nd quarter
Bit [4i+2]: Port i 3rd quarter
Bit [4i+3]: Port i 4th quarter

registers_list.name: spwm_status
registers_list.description: Bit [0] is responsible for selecting between the system clk or generate a clk based on some bit from the counter value depends on the value that write in select bit register.

registers_list.name: clk_muxing_mode
registers_list.description: This register controls clk_muxing_cfg in clock muxing unit

registers_list.name: clk_muxing_count_sel
registers_list.description: This register controls count_sel in clock muxing unit

registers_list.name: clk_muxing_pwm_sel
registers_list.description: This register controls pwm_sel in clock muxing unit

registers_list.name: arbitration_level_thresholds
registers_list.description: This register configures the level thresholds configurations for WRR blocks in multi level arbitration.

registers_list.name: arbitration_level_weights
registers_list.description: This register configures the level weights configurations for WRR blocks in multi level arbitration.

registers_list.name: arbitration_lfsr_rseed
registers_list.description: This register configures rseed for lfsr blocks in  multi level arbitration.

registers_list.name: arbitration_full_queue
registers_list.description:
Full status for all the queues in the block, with 16 queues in the input stage,
 4 queues at the output of the first stage, 2 queues at the output of the second stage, and 1 output queue.

registers_list.name: arbitration_empty_queue
registers_list.description:
Empty status for all the queues in the block, with 16 queues in the input stage,
 4 queues at the output of the first stage, 2 queues at the output of the second stage, and 1 output queue.

registers_list.name: arbitration_occupancy_queue
registers_list.description:
Occupancy status for all the queues in the block, with 16 queues in the input stage,
 4 queues at the output of the first stage, 2 queues at the output of the second stage, and 1 output queue.

registers_list.name: arbitration_almost_full
registers_list.description:
Almost full input for all the queues in the block, with 16 queues in the input stage,
 4 queues at the output of the first stage, 2 queues at the output of the second stage, and 1 output queue.

registers_list.name: arbitration_size_exceeded
registers_list.description:
Size exceeded interrupt for all the queues in the block, with 16 queues in the input stage,
 4 queues at the output of the first stage, 2 queues at the output of the second stage, and 1 output queue.
